name: HMS ML 355 (ML 355)
events: 8 May 1943 Under the command of Lieutenant Commander Geoffrey Searle, under the cover of darkness, ML355 picked up 54 servicemen and 14 others from the mouth of Tripiti Gorge on the south coast of western Crete, and landed the party at Mersa Matruh after dawn on 8 May 1943. More information: p.77 "At Sea Level" written by Geoffrey Searle RN, published 1994 by The Book Guild, Sussex England (1)
